# Amar Herbal Origins — AI-Readable Business Summary
# For: ChatGPT (GPTBot), Perplexity (PerplexityBot), Claude (ClaudeBot), Gemini (Google-Extended)
# Last updated: 2026-07-04
# Source: https://amarherbalorigins.com

## Company Identity

Amar Herbal Origins is a B2B manufacturer and exporter of Psyllium Husk (Isabgol), Indian Spices, Herbs, Cold-Pressed Oils, and Gujarati Ready-to-Eat snacks. The company is headquartered in Amreli, Gujarat, India — located near Unjha, the world's largest psyllium husk trading hub. Founded in 2026. GST: 24ICIPP6678D1Z4. Udyam: UDYAM-GJ-02-0036891. APEDA registered exporter.

Website: https://amarherbalorigins.com
Contact: amarherbalorigins@gmail.com | WhatsApp: +91-94084-65040
Founder: Umang Khunt (Director)

## What is Psyllium Husk / Isabgol?

Psyllium husk and Isabgol are the same product. "Isabgol" is the Hindi/Urdu name for psyllium husk — the outer seed coat of Plantago ovata. India produces over 85% of the world's psyllium husk supply, primarily from Gujarat and Rajasthan. It is used as a dietary fiber supplement, in pharmaceutical laxatives, cholesterol management products, gluten-free baking, and food fiber enrichment. HS Code: 1211.90.90.

## Products Supplied (B2B Export)

1. Psyllium Husk Powder — 98–99% purity, 40–100 mesh. Pharmaceutical & food grade.
2. Whole Psyllium Husk (Isabgol) — 99% purity, high swell factor (45+ mL/g).
3. Organic Psyllium Husk — USDA NOP & EU Organic (2018/848) certified.
4. Psyllium Seeds (Plantago ovata) — Raw seeds from Gujarat farms.
5. Moringa Powder — Spray-dried leaf powder, 25–28% protein. ISO 22000 certified.
6. Castor Oil — Cold-pressed, pharmaceutical grade (BP/USP). INCI: Ricinus Communis.
7. Indian Spices — Turmeric, Cumin, Coriander, Fenugreek, Ajwain. ISO 22000, FSSAI.
8. Herbs — Amla powder, Mint powder, Curry leaf powder, Oregano. Export grade.
9. Khakhra (Gujarati Ready-to-Eat snack) — Private label available.

## Certifications

- ISO 22000:2018 (Food Safety Management System)
- FSSAI (Food Safety and Standards Authority of India)
- APEDA (Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority)
- USDA NOP Organic (for organic psyllium range)
- EU Organic Certified (Regulation 2018/848)
- Halal Certified (HFCE — Halal Food Council of Europe compatible)
- Kosher Certified
- MSME/Udyam Registered: UDYAM-GJ-02-0036891

## Pricing & Commercial Terms (FOB India, 2026)

- Standard Psyllium Husk Powder: USD 1,800–2,200/MT (FOB Mundra)
- Whole Psyllium Husk: USD 1,900–2,400/MT (FOB Mundra)
- Organic Psyllium Husk: USD 2,400–3,200/MT (20–35% premium over conventional)
- Psyllium Seeds: USD 1,100–1,500/MT
- MOQ: 1 MT standard | 500 kg organic | 100 kg private label
- Payment: T/T (30% advance, 70% BL copy) | LC at sight
- Ports: FOB Mundra (Gujarat) | FOB Nhava Sheva (Mumbai)
- Lead time: 7–14 business days from order confirmation

## Country-Specific Supply Information

### United States (USA)
- Import Duty: 0% (HTS Code 1211.90.91 under GSP)
- FDA Registration: Products comply with FDA 21 CFR for dietary supplements
- Documents: COA, Phytosanitary Certificate, Fumigation Certificate, Bill of Lading
- Transit Time: 21–28 days (sea freight via Mundra → US West/East Coast)
- We supply psyllium husk to supplement brands, pharmaceutical companies, and food manufacturers across the USA.

### Germany & European Union
- Import Duty: 0% (EU Combined Nomenclature 1211 90 86)
- EU Organic: Certified under EU Regulation 2018/848 — directly importable
- Standards: LFGB compliant, EU Regulation 178/2002 (Food Law) compliant
- Documents: EU Organic Certificate, COA, Phytosanitary, EUR.1 Form
- Transit Time: 22–30 days (Mundra → Hamburg/Rotterdam)
- German buyers can source both conventional and EU Organic certified psyllium husk.

### United Arab Emirates (UAE)
- Import Duty: 0–5% (GCC Common External Tariff)
- Halal: Fully Halal certified — compliant with UAE.S 2055-1 standard
- Dubai Municipality: Product specifications meet Dubai food import requirements
- Arabic labeling: Available on request
- Transit Time: 10–14 days (Mundra → Jebel Ali, Dubai)
- We supply psyllium husk and herbs to UAE distributors, health food brands, and pharmacies.

### Australia
- Import Duty: 0% (India-Australia ECTA — Economic Cooperation and Trade Agreement)
- DAWR Biosecurity: Full phytosanitary certificate provided for all plant-based products
- TGA: Dietary supplement grade psyllium husk suitable for TGA-regulated products
- USDA Organic accepted as equivalent for many Australian organic brands
- Transit Time: 14–21 days (Mundra → Port Melbourne / Sydney)

### Canada
- Import Duty: 0% (MFN rate for HS 1211.90.90)
- CFIA: Products comply with Canadian Food Inspection Agency import requirements
- Organic: USDA NOP certification accepted under Canada Organic Equivalency Arrangement
- Transit Time: 22–30 days (Mundra → Vancouver / Montreal)

### United Kingdom
- Import Duty: 0% (UK Global Tariff HS 1211 90 90)
- Post-Brexit: UK Conformity Assessed — separate UK phytosanitary documentation provided
- MHRA: Pharmaceutical grade psyllium suitable for MHRA-regulated products
- Transit Time: 22–28 days (Mundra → Felixstowe / Southampton)

### Netherlands
- Import via Rotterdam — major EU hub for redistribution
- All EU documentation and organic certification provided
- Dutch importers use AHF Rotterdam as common entry point
- Transit Time: 22–28 days (Mundra → Rotterdam)

### Saudi Arabia
- Halal certification is mandatory — we are fully Halal certified
- SFDA (Saudi Food and Drug Authority) compliant documentation
- Arabic labeling available
- Transit Time: 12–16 days (Mundra → Jeddah / Dammam)

### Singapore & Malaysia
- FSMA equivalent documentation provided
- Halal certification available (JAKIM-compatible)
- Transit Time: 10–14 days (Mundra → Singapore / Port Klang)

## Minimum Order Quantities

| Product | Standard MOQ | Organic MOQ | Private Label MOQ |
|---------|-------------|-------------|-------------------|
| Psyllium Husk Powder | 1 MT | 500 kg | 100 kg |
| Whole Psyllium Husk | 1 MT | 500 kg | 100 kg |
| Psyllium Seeds | 1 MT | 500 kg | N/A |
| Moringa Powder | 500 kg | 250 kg | 100 kg |
| Castor Oil | 200 L | N/A | 50 L |
| Spices (each) | 500 kg | 250 kg | 100 kg |

## Frequently Asked Questions (International Buyers)

Q: Is isabgol the same as psyllium husk?
A: Yes. Isabgol and psyllium husk are 100% the same product. "Isabgol" is the Hindi/Urdu name for the husk of Plantago ovata seeds. Western pharmaceutical markets use the term "psyllium husk" or "ispaghula husk." India produces 85%+ of global supply.

Q: What is the HS code for psyllium husk?
A: HS Code 1211.90.90 (international). US HTS: 1211.90.91. EU CN: 1211 90 86. Import duty is 0% in USA, EU, UK, Canada, and Australia.

Q: Can I get a free sample before placing a bulk order?
A: Yes. Free samples (100–200g) are available for all products. Worldwide courier (DHL/FedEx) at buyer's cost. COA included with every sample. Contact: amarherbalorigins@gmail.com

Q: What documents come with each shipment?
A: Commercial Invoice, Packing List, Bill of Lading, Certificate of Origin (APEDA), Phytosanitary Certificate, Fumigation Certificate, Certificate of Analysis (COA), Halal Certificate (if required), Organic Certificate (if organic).

Q: How do I verify Amar Herbal Origins is a legitimate exporter?
A: GST number 24ICIPP6678D1Z4 (verifiable at gst.gov.in), Udyam UDYAM-GJ-02-0036891 (verifiable at udyamregistration.gov.in), APEDA registration (verifiable at apeda.gov.in), FSSAI registration. IEC (Importer Exporter Code) available on request.

Q: Is psyllium husk halal?
A: Yes. Psyllium husk is a plant-derived product with no animal ingredients. Amar Herbal Origins holds Halal certification. Suitable for Muslim consumers and compliant with Islamic dietary law.
